title: sclerolaena constricta
intro: Sclerolaena constricta, also known as the Western Australian saltbush, is a plant species native to Western Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sclerolaena constricta include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis and eczema. Herbal preparations of Sclerolaena constricta include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
